HistoryItem.title: HistoryItem
HistoryItem.description: A past analysis result of a chemistry note.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this history item.

topicDetected.description: The detected topic of the note.

questions.description: JSON stringified array of generated questions.

imageUrl.description: URL of the uploaded image (stored in Firebase Storage or base64 if small).

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the analysis was performed.

/users/{userId}/history/{historyId}.description: History items for a specific user.
